name: letters-and-numbers
description: Early-childhood educational PWA grounded in the Norwegian Rammeplan. Static, offline-first, zero build step.

scripts.size: echo 'Asset sizes (raw, then estimated gzip):' && find . -maxdepth 2 -type f \( -name '*.html' -o -name '*.css' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.webmanifest' \) ! -path './node_modules/*' ! -path './.git/*' -exec wc -c {} + | sort -n
